List Available Color Palettes

Source: R/palette.R
list_palettes.Rd

Return a data.frame of all available palette metadata, optionally filtered by type.

Usage

list_palettes(type = NULL, sort = TRUE)

Arguments

type

Palette type(s) to filter: "sequential", "diverging", "qualitative". Default NULL returns all.

sort

Whether to sort by type, n_color, name. Default: TRUE.

Value

A data.frame with columns: name, type, n_color, colors.

Examples

list_palettes()
#>                                      name        type n_color       colors
#> div_contrast                 div_contrast   diverging       2 #C64328,....
#> div_fireice                   div_fireice   diverging       2 #2AA6C6,....
#> div_polar                       div_polar   diverging       2 #8CB5D2,....
#> div_sunset                     div_sunset   diverging       2 #57A2FF,....
#> div_pinkgreen_rb         div_pinkgreen_rb   diverging       3 #E64B35B....
#> div_earthy                     div_earthy   diverging       5 #283618,....
#> div_sage                         div_sage   diverging       7 #EDEAE7,....
#> qual_earthy                   qual_earthy qualitative       3 #C64328,....
#> qual_primary                 qual_primary qualitative       3 #C64328,....
#> qual_softtrio               qual_softtrio qualitative       3 #E64B35B....
#> qual_vintage                 qual_vintage qualitative       3 #96A0D9,....
#> qual_balanced               qual_balanced qualitative       4 #5D83B4,....
#> qual_egypt_met             qual_egypt_met qualitative       4 #dd5129,....
#> qual_kandinsky_met     qual_kandinsky_met qualitative       4 #3b7c70,....
#> qual_greek_met             qual_greek_met qualitative       5 #3c0d03,....
#> qual_isfahan2_met       qual_isfahan2_met qualitative       5 #d7aca1,....
#> qual_java_met               qual_java_met qualitative       5 #663171,....
#> qual_johnson_met         qual_johnson_met qualitative       5 #a00e00,....
#> qual_navajo_met           qual_navajo_met qualitative       5 #660d20,....
#> qual_newkingdom_met   qual_newkingdom_met qualitative       5 #e1846c,....
#> qual_tara_met               qual_tara_met qualitative       5 #eab1c6,....
#> qual_vibrant                 qual_vibrant qualitative       5 #BF3F9D,....
#> qual_violin                   qual_violin qualitative       5 #37848C,....
#> qual_wissing_met         qual_wissing_met qualitative       5 #4b1d0d,....
#> qual_gauguin_met         qual_gauguin_met qualitative       6 #b04948,....
#> qual_harmony                 qual_harmony qualitative       6 #BF3641,....
#> qual_homer2_met           qual_homer2_met qualitative       6 #bf3626,....
#> qual_juarez_met           qual_juarez_met qualitative       6 #a82203,....
#> qual_klimt_met             qual_klimt_met qualitative       6 #df9ed4,....
#> qual_lakota_met           qual_lakota_met qualitative       6 #04a3bd,....
#> qual_pastel                   qual_pastel qualitative       6 #B2AA76,....
#> qual_peru1_met             qual_peru1_met qualitative       6 #b5361c,....
#> qual_peru2_met             qual_peru2_met qualitative       6 #65150b,....
#> qual_pillement_met     qual_pillement_met qualitative       6 #a9845b,....
#> qual_archambault_met qual_archambault_met qualitative       7 #88a0dc,....
#> qual_austria_met         qual_austria_met qualitative       7 #a40000,....
#> qual_degas_met             qual_degas_met qualitative       7 #591d06,....
#> qual_derain_met           qual_derain_met qualitative       7 #efc86e,....
#> qual_hokusai1_met       qual_hokusai1_met qualitative       7 #6d2f20,....
#> qual_jama_g                   qual_jama_g qualitative       7 #374E55,....
#> qual_moreau_met           qual_moreau_met qualitative       7 #421600,....
#> qual_nattier_met         qual_nattier_met qualitative       7 #52271c,....
#> qual_okeeffe2_met       qual_okeeffe2_met qualitative       7 #fbe3c2,....
#> qual_pissaro_met         qual_pissaro_met qualitative       7 #134130,....
#> qual_tron_g                   qual_tron_g qualitative       7 #FF410D,....
#> qual_tsimshian_met     qual_tsimshian_met qualitative       7 #582310,....
#> qual_vangogh1_met       qual_vangogh1_met qualitative       7 #2c2d54,....
#> qual_veronese_met       qual_veronese_met qualitative       7 #67322e,....
#> qual_cassatt1_met       qual_cassatt1_met qualitative       8 #b1615c,....
#> qual_homer1_met           qual_homer1_met qualitative       8 #551f00,....
#> qual_ingres_met           qual_ingres_met qualitative       8 #041d2c,....
#> qual_morgenstern_met qual_morgenstern_met qualitative       8 #98768e,....
#> qual_nejm_g                   qual_nejm_g qualitative       8 #BC3C29,....
#> qual_nizami_met           qual_nizami_met qualitative       8 #dd7867,....
#> qual_set2_rb                 qual_set2_rb qualitative       8 #66C2A5,....
#> qual_tam_met                 qual_tam_met qualitative       8 #ffd353,....
#> qual_thomas_met           qual_thomas_met qualitative       8 #b24422,....
#> qual_tiepolo_met         qual_tiepolo_met qualitative       8 #802417,....
#> qual_troy_met               qual_troy_met qualitative       8 #421401,....
#> qual_vangogh2_met       qual_vangogh2_met qualitative       8 #bd3106,....
#> qual_vangogh3_met       qual_vangogh3_met qualitative       8 #e7e5cc,....
#> qual_cross_met             qual_cross_met qualitative       9 #c969a1,....
#> qual_lancet_g               qual_lancet_g qualitative       9 #00468B,....
#> qual_monet_met             qual_monet_met qualitative       9 #4e6d58,....
#> qual_set1_rb                 qual_set1_rb qualitative       9 #E41A1C,....
#> qual_vivid                     qual_vivid qualitative       9 #E64B35,....
#> qual_cassatt2_met       qual_cassatt2_met qualitative      10 #2d223c,....
#> qual_cosmic_g               qual_cosmic_g qualitative      10 #2E2A2B,....
#> qual_demuth_met           qual_demuth_met qualitative      10 #591c19,....
#> qual_flatui_g               qual_flatui_g qualitative      10 #c0392b,....
#> qual_jco_g                     qual_jco_g qualitative      10 #0073C2,....
#> qual_mobility               qual_mobility qualitative      10 #f7fbff,....
#> qual_npg_g                     qual_npg_g qualitative      10 #E64B35,....
#> qual_manet_met             qual_manet_met qualitative      11 #3b2319,....
#> qual_okeeffe1_met       qual_okeeffe1_met qualitative      11 #6b200c,....
#> qual_paquin_met           qual_paquin_met qualitative      11 #831818,....
#> qual_futurama_g           qual_futurama_g qualitative      12 #FF6F00,....
#> qual_redon_met             qual_redon_met qualitative      12 #5b859e,....
#> qual_renoir_met           qual_renoir_met qualitative      12 #17154f,....
#> qual_set3_rb                 qual_set3_rb qualitative      12 #8DD3C7,....
#> qual_signac_met           qual_signac_met qualitative      14 #fbe183,....
#> qual_pbmc_sc                 qual_pbmc_sc qualitative      17 #a2d2e7,....
#> seq_blues                       seq_blues  sequential       3 #deebf7,....
#> seq_blush                       seq_blush  sequential       4 #FFCDB2,....
#> seq_forest                     seq_forest  sequential       4 #B2C9AD,....
#> seq_muted                       seq_muted  sequential       4 #E2E0C8,....
#> seq_hokusai2                 seq_hokusai2  sequential       6 #abc9c8,....
#> seq_hokusai3                 seq_hokusai3  sequential       6 #d8d97a,....
#> seq_locuszoom               seq_locuszoom  sequential       7 #D43F3A,....
#> seq_isfahan                   seq_isfahan  sequential       8 #4e3910,....
#> seq_mobility                 seq_mobility  sequential       9 #f7fbff,....
#> seq_hiroshige               seq_hiroshige  sequential      10 #e76254,....
#> seq_benedictus             seq_benedictus  sequential      13 #9a133d,....
list_palettes(type = "qualitative")
#>                                      name        type n_color       colors
#> qual_earthy                   qual_earthy qualitative       3 #C64328,....
#> qual_primary                 qual_primary qualitative       3 #C64328,....
#> qual_softtrio               qual_softtrio qualitative       3 #E64B35B....
#> qual_vintage                 qual_vintage qualitative       3 #96A0D9,....
#> qual_balanced               qual_balanced qualitative       4 #5D83B4,....
#> qual_egypt_met             qual_egypt_met qualitative       4 #dd5129,....
#> qual_kandinsky_met     qual_kandinsky_met qualitative       4 #3b7c70,....
#> qual_greek_met             qual_greek_met qualitative       5 #3c0d03,....

#> qual_java_met               qual_java_met qualitative       5 #663171,....

#> qual_wissing_met         qual_wissing_met qualitative       5 #4b1d0d,....
#> qual_gauguin_met         qual_gauguin_met qualitative       6 #b04948,....
#> qual_harmony                 qual_harmony qualitative       6 #BF3641,....
#> qual_homer2_met           qual_homer2_met qualitative       6 #bf3626,....
#> qual_juarez_met           qual_juarez_met qualitative       6 #a82203,....

#> qual_lakota_met           qual_lakota_met qualitative       6 #04a3bd,....

#> qual_peru1_met             qual_peru1_met qualitative       6 #b5361c,....
#> qual_peru2_met             qual_peru2_met qualitative       6 #65150b,....
#> qual_pillement_met     qual_pillement_met qualitative       6 #a9845b,....
#> qual_archambault_met qual_archambault_met qualitative       7 #88a0dc,....
#> qual_austria_met         qual_austria_met qualitative       7 #a40000,....
#> qual_degas_met             qual_degas_met qualitative       7 #591d06,....

#> qual_tsimshian_met     qual_tsimshian_met qualitative       7 #582310,....
#> qual_vangogh1_met       qual_vangogh1_met qualitative       7 #2c2d54,....
#> qual_veronese_met       qual_veronese_met qualitative       7 #67322e,....
#> qual_cassatt1_met       qual_cassatt1_met qualitative       8 #b1615c,....
#> qual_homer1_met           qual_homer1_met qualitative       8 #551f00,....
#> qual_ingres_met           qual_ingres_met qualitative       8 #041d2c,....
#> qual_morgenstern_met qual_morgenstern_met qualitative       8 #98768e,....
#> qual_nejm_g                   qual_nejm_g qualitative       8 #BC3C29,....
#> qual_nizami_met           qual_nizami_met qualitative       8 #dd7867,....
#> qual_set2_rb                 qual_set2_rb qualitative       8 #66C2A5,....
#> qual_tam_met                 qual_tam_met qualitative       8 #ffd353,....
#> qual_thomas_met           qual_thomas_met qualitative       8 #b24422,....
#> qual_tiepolo_met         qual_tiepolo_met qualitative       8 #802417,....
#> qual_troy_met               qual_troy_met qualitative       8 #421401,....
#> qual_vangogh2_met       qual_vangogh2_met qualitative       8 #bd3106,....
#> qual_vangogh3_met       qual_vangogh3_met qualitative       8 #e7e5cc,....
#> qual_cross_met             qual_cross_met qualitative       9 #c969a1,....
#> qual_lancet_g               qual_lancet_g qualitative       9 #00468B,....
#> qual_monet_met             qual_monet_met qualitative       9 #4e6d58,....
#> qual_set1_rb                 qual_set1_rb qualitative       9 #E41A1C,....
#> qual_vivid                     qual_vivid qualitative       9 #E64B35,....
#> qual_cassatt2_met       qual_cassatt2_met qualitative      10 #2d223c,....
#> qual_cosmic_g               qual_cosmic_g qualitative      10 #2E2A2B,....
#> qual_demuth_met           qual_demuth_met qualitative      10 #591c19,....
#> qual_flatui_g               qual_flatui_g qualitative      10 #c0392b,....
#> qual_jco_g                     qual_jco_g qualitative      10 #0073C2,....
#> qual_mobility               qual_mobility qualitative      10 #f7fbff,....
#> qual_npg_g                     qual_npg_g qualitative      10 #E64B35,....
#> qual_manet_met             qual_manet_met qualitative      11 #3b2319,....
#> qual_okeeffe1_met       qual_okeeffe1_met qualitative      11 #6b200c,....
#> qual_paquin_met           qual_paquin_met qualitative      11 #831818,....
#> qual_futurama_g           qual_futurama_g qualitative      12 #FF6F00,....
#> qual_redon_met             qual_redon_met qualitative      12 #5b859e,....
#> qual_renoir_met           qual_renoir_met qualitative      12 #17154f,....
#> qual_set3_rb                 qual_set3_rb qualitative      12 #8DD3C7,....
#> qual_signac_met           qual_signac_met qualitative      14 #fbe183,....
#> qual_pbmc_sc                 qual_pbmc_sc qualitative      17 #a2d2e7,....
list_palettes(type = c("sequential", "diverging"))
#>                              name       type n_color       colors
#> div_contrast         div_contrast  diverging       2 #C64328,....
#> div_fireice           div_fireice  diverging       2 #2AA6C6,....
#> div_polar               div_polar  diverging       2 #8CB5D2,....
#> div_sunset             div_sunset  diverging       2 #57A2FF,....
#> div_pinkgreen_rb div_pinkgreen_rb  diverging       3 #E64B35B....
#> div_earthy             div_earthy  diverging       5 #283618,....
#> div_sage                 div_sage  diverging       7 #EDEAE7,....
#> seq_blues               seq_blues sequential       3 #deebf7,....
#> seq_blush               seq_blush sequential       4 #FFCDB2,....
#> seq_forest             seq_forest sequential       4 #B2C9AD,....
#> seq_muted               seq_muted sequential       4 #E2E0C8,....

#> seq_hokusai3         seq_hokusai3 sequential       6 #d8d97a,....
